headline: The same files were read repeatedly (+1 more).

findings.title: The same files were read repeatedly
findings.recommendation: Surface prior reads to the model or return cached-read hints for duplicate targets.

findings.title: A process had untracked workspace write capability
evidence: delegate_external · agent writer · child cmd_writer · access granted
findings.recommendation: Audit the process output and workspace diff separately; the trace records that write-capable access was granted, not per-file writes.
